name: Weikeng Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Weikeng Industrial Co., Ltd. distributes electronic components and peripherals for computing, communications, consumer, automotive, and industrial applications in Taiwan. The company offers storage, micro controller, embedded processor, power discrete IC, sensing and display, discrete and passive components, programmable logic and display systems, ESD protection, connectors, digital audio/video, and USB products. It also offers technical support services; and data center, IoT application, data and communications, automotive, networking, industrial electronics, and consumer solutions. Weikeng Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
